contents: (** This stops typeclass search from trying to unfold op. *)

Instance isgraph_op {A : Type} `{IsGraph A}
  : IsGraph A^op.

goals.conclusion: IsGraph A^op
IsGraph A^op
A -> A -> Type

contents: intros a b; exact (Hom b a).
Instance is01cat_op {A : Type} `{Is01Cat A} : Is01Cat A^op.

goals.conclusion: Is01Cat A^op
Is01Cat A^op
forall a : A, a $-> a
forall a b c : A, (c $-> b) -> (b $-> a) -> c $-> a
forall a : A, a $-> a
forall a b c : A, (c $-> b) -> (b $-> a) -> c $-> a

contents: intros a b c f g; exact (cat_comp g f).
(** We don't invert 2-cells as this is op on the first level. *)
Instance is2graph_op {A : Type} `{Is2Graph A} : Is2Graph A^op.

goals.conclusion: Is2Graph A^op
Is2Graph A^op
forall a b : A, IsGraph (b $-> a)

contents: intros a b; exact (isgraph_hom b a).
Instance is1cat_op {A : Type} `{Is1Cat A} : Is1Cat A^op.

goals.conclusion: Is1Cat A^op
Is1Cat A^op
forall a b : A, Is01Cat (b $-> a)
forall a b : A, Is0Gpd (b $-> a)
forall (a b c : A) (g : c $-> b), Is0Functor (fun g0 : b $-> a => g0 $o g)
forall (a b c : A) (f : b $-> a), Is0Functor (fun g : c $-> b => f $o g)

forall (a b c d : A) (f : b $-> a) (g : c $-> b) (h : d $-> c),
f $o (g $o h) $-> f $o g $o h

forall (a b c d : A) (f : b $-> a) (g : c $-> b) (h : d $-> c),
f $o g $o h $-> f $o (g $o h)
forall (a b : A) (f : b $-> a), f $o Id b $-> f
forall (a b : A) (f : b $-> a), Id a $o f $-> f
forall a b : A, Is01Cat (b $-> a)

contents: intros a b; exact (is01cat_hom b a).

goals.conclusion: forall a b : A, Is0Gpd (b $-> a)

contents: intros a b; exact (is0gpd_hom b a).

goals.conclusion: forall (a b c : A) (g : c $-> b), Is0Functor (fun g0 : b $-> a => g0 $o g)

contents: intros a b c; exact (is0functor_precomp c b a).

goals.conclusion: forall (a b c : A) (f : b $-> a), Is0Functor (fun g : c $-> b => f $o g)

contents: intros a b c; exact (is0functor_postcomp c b a).

goals.conclusion:
forall (a b c d : A) (f : b $-> a) (g : c $-> b) (h : d $-> c),
f $o (g $o h) $-> f $o g $o h

contents: intros a b c d f g h; exact (cat_assoc_opp h g f).

goals.conclusion:
forall (a b c d : A) (f : b $-> a) (g : c $-> b) (h : d $-> c),
f $o g $o h $-> f $o (g $o h)

contents: intros a b c d f g h; exact (cat_assoc h g f).

goals.conclusion: forall (a b : A) (f : b $-> a), f $o Id b $-> f
forall (a b : A) (f : b $-> a), Id a $o f $-> f
Is1Cat_Strong A^op
Is1Cat_Strong A^op
forall a b : A, Is01Cat (b $-> a)
forall a b : A, Is0Gpd (b $-> a)
forall (a b c : A) (g : c $-> b), Is0Functor (fun g0 : b $-> a => g0 $o g)
forall (a b c : A) (f : b $-> a), Is0Functor (fun g : c $-> b => f $o g)

forall (a b c d : A) (f : b $-> a) (g : c $-> b) (h : d $-> c),
f $o (g $o h) = f $o g $o h

forall (a b c d : A) (f : b $-> a) (g : c $-> b) (h : d $-> c),
f $o g $o h = f $o (g $o h)
forall (a b : A) (f : b $-> a), f $o Id b = f
forall (a b : A) (f : b $-> a), Id a $o f = f
forall a b : A, Is01Cat (b $-> a)

contents: intros a b; exact (is01cat_hom_strong b a).

goals.conclusion: forall a b : A, Is0Gpd (b $-> a)

contents: intros a b; exact (is0gpd_hom_strong b a).

goals.conclusion: forall (a b c : A) (g : c $-> b), Is0Functor (fun g0 : b $-> a => g0 $o g)

contents: intros a b c; exact (is0functor_precomp_strong c b a).

goals.conclusion: forall (a b c : A) (f : b $-> a), Is0Functor (fun g : c $-> b => f $o g)

contents: intros a b c; exact (is0functor_postcomp_strong c b a).

goals.conclusion:
forall (a b c d : A) (f : b $-> a) (g : c $-> b) (h : d $-> c),
f $o (g $o h) = f $o g $o h

contents: intros a b c d f g h; exact (cat_assoc_opp_strong h g f).

goals.conclusion:
forall (a b c d : A) (f : b $-> a) (g : c $-> b) (h : d $-> c),
f $o g $o h = f $o (g $o h)

contents: intros a b c d f g h; exact (cat_assoc_strong h g f).

goals.conclusion: forall (a b : A) (f : b $-> a), f $o Id b = f
forall (a b : A) (f : b $-> a), Id a $o f = f
Is0Gpd A^op
Is0Gpd A^op
forall a b : A, (b $-> a) -> a $-> b

contents:
Instance op0gpd_fun A `{Is0Gpd A} :
  Is0Functor((fun x => x) : A^op -> A).

goals.conclusion: Is0Functor (idmap : A^op -> A)
Is0Functor (idmap : A^op -> A)
forall a b : A, (b $-> a) -> a $-> b
Is0Functor (F : A^op -> B^op)
Is0Functor (F : A^op -> B^op)
forall a b : A, (b $-> a) -> F b $-> F a
Is1Functor (F : A^op -> B^op)
Is1Functor (F : A^op -> B^op)
forall (a b : A) (f g : b $-> a), (f $-> g) -> fmap F f $-> fmap F g
forall a : A, fmap F (Id a) $-> Id (F a)

forall (a b c : A) (f : b $-> a) (g : c $-> b),
fmap F (f $o g) $-> fmap F f $o fmap F g
forall (a b : A) (f g : b $-> a), (f $-> g) -> fmap F f $-> fmap F g

contents: intros a b f g; exact (fmap2 F).

goals.conclusion: forall a : A, fmap F (Id a) $-> Id (F a)

forall (a b c : A) (f : b $-> a) (g : c $-> b),
fmap F (f $o g) $-> fmap F f $o fmap F g

contents: intros a b c f g; exact (fmap_comp F g f).

(** Since [Is01Cat] structures are definitionally involutive (see test/WildCat/Opposite.v), we can use [is0functor_op] to transform in the reverse direction as well.  This result makes that much easier to use in practice. *)

Instance is0functor_op' A B (F : A^op -> B^op)
  `{IsGraph A, IsGraph B, Fop : !Is0Functor (F : A^op -> B^op)}
  : Is0Functor (F : A -> B)
  := is0functor_op A^op B^op F.

Instance is1functor_op' A B (F : A^op -> B^op)
  `{Is1Cat A, Is1Cat B, !Is0Functor (F : A^op -> B^op), Fop2 : !Is1Functor (F : A^op -> B^op)}
  : Is1Functor (F : A -> B)
  := is1functor_op A^op B^op F.

Instance hasmorext_op {A : Type} `{H0 : HasMorExt A}
  : HasMorExt A^op.

goals.conclusion: HasMorExt A^op
HasMorExt A^op
HasMorExt A

contents: intros a b; exact (isequiv_Htpy_path b a).

Instance isinitial_op_isterminal {A : Type} `{Is1Cat A} (x : A)
  {t : IsTerminal x} : IsInitial (A := A^op) x
  := t.

Instance isterminal_op_isinitial {A : Type} `{Is1Cat A} (x : A)
  {i : IsInitial x} : IsTerminal (A := A^op) x
  := i.
